fields.summary: Enhancements to YARN for Windows Server and Windows Azure development and runtime environments

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.

fields.description: This JIRA tracks the work that needs to be done on trunk to enable Hadoop to run on Windows Server and Azure environments. This incorporates porting relevant work from the similar effort on branch 1 tracked via HADOOP-8079.
